chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4787 of 2016 Dr. Fehmida Bhutto Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.04.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2016, which is about nine years ago. It was last taken up on 27.03.2019, which is also about six years ago. Since then no urgent application has been moved by learned counsel for the petitioner despite lapse of six years. Today none is present on behalf of the petitioner without any intimation. It shows that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge
